title: Dirty Plugin Disabled Broken
objective: A disposable user state with a disabled plugin whose files are broken, proving disabled dirty plugins do not break gateway startup or become enabled during repair.

setup.title: Write Dirty Plugin Disabled Broken
setup.intent: Install a disabled plugin with intentionally broken manifest/runtime files.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs prepare dirty-plugin-disabled-broken

setup.title: Verify Dirty Plugin Disabled Broken
setup.intent: Verify the disabled broken plugin remained disabled and was not destructively rewritten.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs verify dirty-plugin-disabled-broken

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes disabled broken fixture files

source.note: disabled plugin with broken manifest and runtime files
